title: What is Audio, Speech, and Music AI?
summary: Audio/Speech/Music AI encompasses ASR, TTS, music generation, and full-duplex voice agents, with 2026 emphasis on end-to-end models that preserve prosody and enable natural multi-turn interaction without text transcription.
use_when: User asks for the definition, scope, or purpose of Audio, Speech, and Music AI.
